response.justification: The resume shows extensive senior-level experience but misrepresents the candidate as a junior/mid-level applicant; the name discrepancy (Sarah Smith vs. Bogdan Szabo) raises red flags about authenticity, and the candidate lacks clear focus on renewable energy/construction tech, React/Nest.js depth, PostgreSQL, or on-site readiness despite German language limitations.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Strong open-source contributions and architectural awareness
Proven track record in complex systems and dev-ops tooling
concerns: Resume name (Sarah Smith) does not match profile name (Bogdan Szabo)
Overqualified with 10+ years senior experience, not entry-level
No evidence of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, AWS services, or German proficiency for on-site role

key_factors.factor: Lack of required tech stack depth
